name: /cost-report --by=rule aggregates totals per rule dimension per H-12
command: mkdir -p rollup/daily && printf '%s' '{"entries":[{"rule":"no-eval","tokens_in":50,"tokens_out":20,"invocations":3}]}' > rollup/daily/2026-05-25.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cost-report.sh" --window=daily --by=rule --rollup-dir=rollup --format=json >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.totals["no-eval"].invocations===3?0:1)' && echo grouped 1>&2
